section_text:
[gcode_macro CONDITIONAL_SHUTDOWN]
gcode:
  {% if printer["gcode_macro SET_SHUTDOWN_AFTER_PRINT"].shutdown == 1 %}
    M118 "Shutdown after print selected. Shutting down printer after cooldown."
    TURN_OFF_HEATERS
    M106 S0
    TEMPERATURE_WAIT SENSOR=extruder MAXIMUM=50
    TEMPERATURE_WAIT SENSOR=heater_bed MAXIMUM=50
    SHUTDOWN
  {% endif %}
